parameters.query:
SELECT draft_id, content_type,
       COALESCE(edited_text, draft_text) AS final_text,
       edited_text,
       context_json,
       approver_discord_id,
       discord_channel_id
FROM pipemind.approval_drafts
WHERE draft_id = $1::uuid AND status = 'approved' AND boundary_audit_passed = TRUE;

INSERT INTO pipemind.delivered_actions (draft_id, action_type, dedup_key)
VALUES ($1::uuid, 'drive_save', $2)
ON CONFLICT (dedup_key) DO NOTHING
RETURNING action_id;

INSERT INTO pipemind.delivered_actions (draft_id, action_type, dedup_key)
VALUES ($1::uuid, 'gmail_send', $2)
ON CONFLICT (dedup_key) DO NOTHING
RETURNING action_id;

INSERT INTO pipemind.delivered_actions (draft_id, action_type, dedup_key)
VALUES ($1::uuid, 'discord_qa', $2)
ON CONFLICT (dedup_key) DO NOTHING
RETURNING action_id;

INSERT INTO pipemind.delivered_actions (draft_id, action_type, dedup_key)
VALUES ($1::uuid, 'discord_welcome', $2)
ON CONFLICT (dedup_key) DO NOTHING
RETURNING action_id;

INSERT INTO pipemind.delivered_actions (draft_id, action_type, dedup_key)
VALUES ($1::uuid, 'clockify_write', $2)
ON CONFLICT (dedup_key) DO NOTHING
RETURNING action_id;
SELECT clockify_user_id FROM pipemind.roster WHERE discord_id = $1 AND active = TRUE AND role = 'developer' LIMIT 1;

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ content: '[Pipemind] Your time log was approved but Clockify returned an error when we tried to write the entry. Please log your time manually in Clockify for today. The team lead has been notified.' }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ content: '[Pipemind] Your time entry has been logged in Clockify: ' + $('Parse Time Entry').item.json.final_hours + 'h on ' + $('Parse Time Entry').item.json.feature_area + '. All done for today!' }) }}

parameters.query:

ON CONFLICT (dedup_key) DO NOTHING
RETURNING action_id;

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ summary: 'Focus session — ' + $json.feature_area, start: { dateTime: $json.start_iso }, end: { dateTime: $json.end_iso } }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ content: '[Pipemind] Done — your calendar block has been created for ' + $('Parse Calendar Context').item.json.feature_area + '.' }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ content: '[Pipemind] I was unable to create the calendar block. Please create it manually in Google Calendar.' }) }}

parameters.query:
UPDATE pipemind.unblock_offers SET status = 'colleague_done', updated_at = now()
WHERE draft_id = $1::uuid AND status = 'colleague_draft_pending';

UPDATE pipemind.unblock_offers SET status = 'meeting_done', updated_at = now()
WHERE draft_id = $1::uuid AND status = 'meeting_draft_pending';

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ content: '[Pipemind] No calendar linked for your account — please create the block manually in Google Calendar.' }) }}

parameters.query: DELETE FROM pipemind.delivered_actions WHERE action_id = $1::uuid;
